team.bio: Former competitive gamer turned entrepreneur with a vision to build Europe's premier esports organization.

mission.title: OUR MISSION
paragraphs: Founded in 2020, Tempest eSports has rapidly grown to become one of the most respected organizations in competitive gaming. We believe in nurturing talent, fostering innovation, and creating opportunities for players to reach their full potential.

Our mission is simple: to dominate the digital battlefield while building a legacy that inspires the next generation of esports athletes. We're not just playing games – we're shaping the future of competitive gaming.
